## Testing

## Safety checklist

- [ ] No API keys or secrets are committed.
- [ ] Free-model routing still requires `:free` model ids.
- [ ] OpenRouter requests still enforce zero max price.
- [ ] Export/import still excludes API keys.
- [ ] UI changes were checked on desktop and mobile widths.
